description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large, rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The ground floor includes an open porch area supported by columns, with visible outdoor seating and a decorative front garden or planter. The upper floor has a balcony with a minimalist railing, overlooking the front of the house. The side and rear facades are mostly solid, with minimal window openings and a utilitarian back door. The overall structure is composed of smooth, white exterior walls, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large symmetrical windows, and a prominent front porch with balcony above. The exterior is smooth and white, emphasizing a minimalist, contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, open porch with columns, balcony, and decorative front garden.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid wall, minimal window openings, and part of the balcony visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wall, a double door, and minimal architectural detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid wall and a small window, showing the depth of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a double door beneath a covered porch with columns and a balcony above, accented by a decorative front garden.
